prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 93.5 kg; Height 169.1 cm; BMI 32.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.7%; 6 months ago 9.7%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.3%), FPG (12 months ago 262mg/dL; 9 months ago 276mg/dL; 6 months ago 250mg/dL; 3 months ago 236mg/dL; current 293mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 94.9kg; 9 months ago 95.2kg; 6 months ago 92.9kg; 3 months ago 91.3kg; current 93.5kg), Height (12 months ago 169.1cm; 9 months ago 169.1cm; 6 months ago 169.1cm; 3 months ago 169.1cm; current 169.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 37U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 34U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 93mg/g; 9 months ago 133mg/g; 6 months ago 139mg/g; 3 months ago 158mg/g; current 148mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 60mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 117mg/dL; 9 months ago 137mg/dL; 6 months ago 120mg/dL; 3 months ago 116mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
